Operation 'createVkycSession' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks details about what inputs are required, what the response contains, and how the session progresses. Enhanced description clarifies the request requirements, response structure (VkycSession object with session ID and URL), and session state transitions for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Creates a new video KYC session for identity verification of a customer.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new video KYC session to initiate the identity verification workflow. Requires customer details provided in the request body. Returns a VkycSession object containing the session ID, status, and verification URL for the customer to complete video KYC. The session is created in pending state and transitions through verification stages as the customer completes the process.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks details about what inputs are required, what the response contains, and how the session progresses. Enhanced description clarifies the request requirements, response structure (VkycSession object with session ID and URL), and session state transitions for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getVkycSession' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is vague about required inputs and response structure. Enhanced description specifies the sessionId parameter requirement, details the VkycSession response object contents, and provides context for when to use this operation (polling progress or retrieving results), improving AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieves the current status and details of a video KYC session.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status and details of a video KYC session by session ID. Requires the sessionId path parameter. Returns a VkycSession object containing the session status, verification results, timestamps, and any error details if verification failed. Use this to poll session progress or retrieve final verification results.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about required inputs and response structure. data.current_description: Verifies an identity document such as Aadhaar, PAN card, or passport.
data.description_suggestion: Verifies an identity document (Aadhaar, PAN card, passport, or other supported documents) against government databases. Requires document type, document number, and customer details in the request body. Returns a VerificationResult object containing verification status (success/failure), confidence score, and any validation errors. Supports real-time verification workflows.

data.current_description: Initializes an electronic signature workflow for document signing.
data.description_suggestion: Initializes an electronic signature workflow to enable document signing. Requires document details, signer information, and signing parameters in the request body. Returns an EsignSession object containing the session ID, signing URL, and session status. The workflow transitions to active state, allowing the signer to access the document and complete the signing process through the provided URL.
